name: SLAIF Connect
description: Browser-side SSH launcher for approved SLAIF HPC systems over a WebSocket relay.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://connect.slaif.si http://127.0.0.1:* wss://connect.slaif.si ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:*
